text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Bertholdt is the tallest of all the cadets in the Cadet Corps. He sports messy brown hair with pale green eyes and wears the standard Cadet Corps uniform.

Personality

Bertholdt is a quiet young man who lacks self-assurance. This is why he is often unnoticed, something he is insecure about. He is close to Reiner, who gives him some advice on how to get noticed.
